_comment: Registry of all scheduled tasks in the Merlin system. Single source of truth for chat-agent delegation + cron reference. Edit this file, then run 'merlin doctor' to verify cron + playbook alignment. The set below ships as reference patterns — replace, extend, or delete to fit your own automation.

tasks.name: morning-digest
tasks.description: Reference job. Compile calendar, tasks, news headlines, and weather; deliver via long-form-rule (HTML email + phone pointer + APNs push). The canonical template for any cron-driven content job.

tasks.name: hum
tasks.schedule_human: Every 20 minutes — the always-on hum of ambient awareness
tasks.description: Every 20 minutes, fan out to the configured harvesters (weather, news, calendar, tasks, watchdog, serendipity by default — extend with your own), rank candidates with a Sonnet subagent, optionally surface one as a chat ping. Most ticks exit silently via the bash gates in the trigger script. See agent/ops-agent/jobs/hum.md for the playbook.

tasks.name: hum-review
tasks.description: Weekly self-assessment of hum: analyzes 7 days of ticks, pings, questions, answers, reactions, and memory growth. Emails the user a memo with engagement stats and proposed tuning. Never applies tuning automatically — proposals only. Read-only on all hum state files.

tasks.name: wiki-audit
tasks.description: Nightly re-evaluation of the wiki pinned-page subset. Reads data/wiki-access.jsonl (last 7 days, MCP caller only), pins any unpinned page hit ≥ 5 times, unpins any pinned page with 0 hits AND pinned for ≥ 7 days AND not pin_locked. Emails the user a digest only when something changes (silent on no-op nights). Direct script — no webhook, no Anthropic API.

tasks.name: memory-snapshot
tasks.description: Auto-commit + push the auto-memory dir to its private backup repo (${MERLIN_BACKUP_REPO}). Idempotent on no-changes. Primary backup layer for the memory corpus — pre-reindex tarballs in data/memory-snapshots/ are belt-and-suspenders.

tasks.name: chrome-cdp-watch
tasks.description: Probe Chrome DevTools Protocol on port 9222 and notify the user once per UP→DOWN transition so they can investigate a lost TCC grant / closed Chrome / chrome-devtools-mcp re-sign. Silent on recovery. Quiet hours 00:00–09:00 local defer the ping to the 09:00-tick. State in data/chrome-cdp-state.json. Direct script — no webhook, no Anthropic API.

tasks.name: context-sync
tasks.description: Re-index your wired-in sources (notes, messages, email memories, project files) into the context search database.
